case_title: RAMA DAS RANSON VS. JOSE LUIS MARQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANSON, RAMA DAS AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, JOSE LUIS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, JOSE LUIS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANSON, RAMA DAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, JOSE LUIS $4,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,615.00 FILED BY RANSON, RAMA DAS AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, JOSE LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-16-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, JOSE LUIS
